title: BIG4 Anglesea Holiday Park
description: Low-key lodging option with an indoor water park, plus indoor and outdoor pools.
address: 45 Murray St, Anglesea VIC 3230, Australia
hotelDescription:
These low-key cabins are 11 km from the Southside Beach, the Split Point Lighthouse and the Point Addis Marine National Park.
 The 1- to 3-bedroom cabins with wood-panelled walls and simple decor have free Wi-Fi, flat-screen TVs with DVD players,  full kitchens and separate sitting areas, as well as balconies and terraces. Upgrades add whirlpool baths.
 Amenities include indoor and outdoor pools, plus an indoor water park. There's also a business centre and free parking, plus campgrounds.

title: Landscove Holiday Park
description: Simple chalets and caravans, plus a kids' club, an arcade, and indoor and outdoor pools.
address: Gillard Rd, Berry Head, Brixham TQ5 9EP, United Kingdom
hotelDescription:
This holiday park is a 7-minute walk from the beach, the SW Coast Path and Berry Head National Nature Reserve, and 1.2 miles from Brixham.
 The basic chalets and caravans have TVs, kitchens and en suite bathrooms. Upgraded suites are also available.
 Free use of indoor and outdoor pools is included in the price. There's a kids' club, plus a playground and arcade. Minimum-stay rules apply.

title: Sunborn London
description: Sleek yacht hotel offering classic rooms and suites with touch controls, plus a spa and restaurant.
address: Royal Victoria Dock, London E16 1AA, United Kingdom
hotelDescription:
Set on a luxury yacht moored in the Docklands, this upscale hotel is adjacent to the ExCel London convention centre and a 5-minute walk from Docklands Light Rail trains to central London. It's 2 miles from London City Airport.
 Polished, classic rooms have en suite bathrooms and feature flat-screen TVs and Wi-Fi, plus touch-pad room controls. Upgraded rooms add coffeemakers, balconies and river views. Suites add sitting areas or living rooms and soaking tubs. Some have decks.
 There's an upscale restaurant serving British fusion cuisine and a sleek bar, plus a day spa and event space for up to 250 guests.

title: Pestana Chelsea Bridge
description: Chic quarters & a full-service spa, plus an indoor pool, a trendy bar & a Portuguese restaurant.
address: 354 Queenstown Rd, Nine Elms, London SW11 8AE, United Kingdom
hotelDescription:
A 9-minute walk from Battersea Park tube station, this upscale hotel in Chelsea Wharf is also 2 miles from Buckingham Palace and 3 miles from the British Museum.
 The chic, contemporary rooms come with complimentary Wi-Fi, flat-screen TVs and iPod docks. They also have minibars, and tea and coffeemaking equipment. Family rooms add sofabeds, while suites offer separate lounges, wet bars and balconies, as well as access to a private lounge with perks such as snacks.
 A spa offers an indoor pool, a sauna and a steam room. Other amenities include a Portuguese restaurant, a hip lobby bar and a gym, plus a business centre and meeting space.
searchString: caravan parks Great Ocean Road VIC

title: Victoria Park House Hotel
description: Warmly styled rooms in an 1897 house offering a bar-and-grill and a lounge bar, plus free breakfast.
address: 221 Ferry Rd., Edinburgh EH6 4NN, United Kingdom
hotelDescription:
Set in an 1897 Victorian home with a tower, this polished hotel in a leafy residential neighbourhood is less than a mile from the Leith waterfront and a 1-minute walk from the nearest bus stop for service into the city centre.
 The 10 warmly decorated rooms have en suite bathrooms with power showers, as well as flat-screen TVs, free Wi-Fi, and tea and coffeemaking facilities. Children under age 12 stay at no extra cost in a parent's bedroom.
 Breakfast and parking are complimentary. Other amenities include a relaxed bar-and-grill, a beer garden, and a cocktail lounge with an oak-panelled bar. Airport transfers and meeting rooms are available.
searchString: caravan parks Great Ocean Road VIC

title: Holiday Inn Express St. Albans - M25, JCT.22 by IHG
description: Modern rooms in a straightforward hotel offering free breakfast, parking & Wi-Fi, plus a bar.
address: Colney Fields Shopping Park, Shenley, St Albans AL2 1AB, United Kingdom
hotelDescription:
Off the M25 motorway, this straightforward hotel is 5 miles from the Roman artefacts at Verulamium Museum and 9 miles from the Harry Potter film set at Warner Bros. Studio Tour London.
 The modern rooms have flat-screen TVs, safes and free Wi-Fi, plus tea and coffeemaking facilities. Some provide sofabeds. Kids stay at no extra cost with an adult.
 Complimentary perks include parking, and a breakfast buffet served in a casual dining area. There's also a lounge bar that serves light meals, plus a business centre and a meeting room.

hotelAds.title: Holiday Inn Express St. Albans - M25, JCT.22 by IHG
